title: Projection manifest
description: Written only by the build workflow (src/replay.js), never by a batch. Pins everything a reproduction attempt needs (SPEC.md §7, acceptance criteria #8): ledger head, projector version, policy hashes, and every basis_id in scope. projections/current/manifest.json is a default-view pointer, not a truth claim (invariant 11) — every artifact it points to still carries this same shape and its own basis/lens identity.

projection_id.description: Hash of ledger_head + projector_version + policy_hashes + basis_ids_in_scope + configuration (§7) — content-addressed, not a counter.

lens_id.description: Which basis/lens standpoint this projection was built from. 'default' for projections/current/ itself; a basis_id-derived slug for projections/current/<lens-id>/.

basis_ids_in_scope.description: Every basis_id any measurement in this projection depends on. A projection mixing measurements from an undeclared basis_id fails its own consistency check (invariant 18).

ledger_head.description: The event DAG's current frontier: event_ids with no other retained event listing them as an input. NOT a sequencer position (invariant 2) — a set, not a number.

policy_hashes.description: Every config/*.yaml this build read, by filename, hashed — so a policy change is visible in the manifest even if the ledger didn't change.

determinism.description: reproduced: identical ledger + policy + classifier + embedding model/version + algorithm version yields byte-identical output. attested: verifiable against recorded inputs, not rebuildable from scratch (invariant 4). Never 'reproduced' while depending on an unpinned or nondeterministic call.

attested_inputs.description: Present and non-empty only when determinism is 'attested' — names which specific inputs are not independently regenerable.

counts.description: Coarse stats a human skims before opening holons/ — batches folded, events resolved (post retraction/supersession), holons at each grain.

diff_of.description: The previous projection_id this one's projections/current/<lens-id>/diff.json explains the change from, or null for a first build (invariant 9).
